case_title: LUPE SANCHEZ VS. ADAMS R LIA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF RE: RESET OF COURT TRIAL TO ALLOW MORE TIME FOR SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANCHEZ, LUPE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-14-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO SEP-13-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 TO BE HEARD WITH 855101. PLAINTIFF LUPE SANCHEZ APPEARED. DEFENDANT ADAMS R. LIA DID NOT APPEAR. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SANCHEZ, LUPE AS TO DEFENDANT LIA, ADAMS R ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-20-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-14-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUN-20-2017 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $92.49 SERVED JUN-22-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LIA, ADAMS R
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF SEP-13-2017 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
